nameMenu.emptyNameError: The chat name must not be empty
nameMenu.leaveConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to leave this chat? You can rejoin at any time if it is a group chat.
nameMenu.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.

attachments.fileTooLarge: The file ":name" could not be attached because its size of :size exceeds the maximum file size of :maxSize.
attachments.unsupportedFileType: The file ":name" could not be attached because the file type ":type" is not supported.

export.title: Export
export.tooltip: Choose an option to export this conversation

systemPromptDialog.title: Edit system prompt
systemPromptDialog.description: The system prompt defines the model's behaviour for this session.
systemPromptDialog.placeholder: You are a helpful assistant for academic work…

modePanel.actionBusy: You can not do this right now. Please wait until the current action is finished.

settings.temperatureInfo: Controls the creativity of the AI's responses. Higher values (e.g. 0.8) lead to more diverse and imaginative results; lower values (e.g. 0.2) make responses more focused and predictable.
settings.topPInfo: Limits the AI's choices to the most probable words whose combined probability does not exceed this value. A lower Top P value (e.g. 0.7) leads to more conservative responses; higher values (e.g. 0.9) allow greater variety.

tool.notSupportedTooltip: This tool is not supported by :model

toolMenu.infoUnsupported: (not supported by current model) | Click for more information
toolMenu.infoDefault: Show more information about the tool

fileChips.conflictMessage: Not supported by the current model

actions.invalidModelTooltip: Please select a different model or remove incompatible tools/files
actions.improveTooltip: Improve your input with AI-powered suggestions

regen.onlyAssistantMessages: Only assistant messages can be regenerated
regen.modelNotAvailable: The model used for this message (:model) is not available. Using fallback model :fallback.
regen.toolNotAvailable: The tool :tool used for this message is not available. It will be skipped in regeneration.
regen.toolNotAvailableForModel: The tool :tool used for this message is not available for the selected model. It will be skipped in regeneration.

sending.responseError: An error occurred while processing the response.
sending.sendError: An error occurred while sending the message.
